sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table AS SELECT * FROM globs('hdfs://hdfs1:9000/{data,logs}/file{1..5}.txt', 'CSV', 'name String, value UInt32');
INSERT INTO test_table SELECT name, value FROM globs('hdfs://hdfs1:9000/data/*', 'TSV', 'name String, value UInt32');
UPDATE test_table SET value = value + 1 WHERE name LIKE 'user%';
SELECT count(*) FROM globs('hdfs://hdfs1:9000/{test,dev,prod}/logs/*.log', 'TSV', 'name String, value UInt32') WHERE value > 100;
DELETE FROM test_table WHERE name IN (SELECT name FROM globs('hdfs://hdfs1:9000/old_data/*.json', 'JSON', 'name String, value UInt32'));
